assignments.description: Adds the Authorization Form ID of the current authorization form data use record to the authorizationForms collection.
assignments.name: AddAuthorizationFormIdToCollection
assignments.label: Add Authorization Form ID to Collection

assignments.description: Adds the Content Document ID of the current authorization form text record to the ContentDocumentIds collection. Adds the Authorization Form Text ID of the current authorization form text record to the authorizationFormTextIds collection.
assignments.name: AddAuthorizationFormTextIdAndContentDocumentIdToCollection
assignments.label: Add Authorization Form Text ID and Content Document ID to Collection

assignments.description: Adds the Content Document ID of the current authorization form text record to the ContentDocumentIds collection.
assignments.name: AddContentDocumentIdToCollection
assignments.label: Add Content Document ID to Collection

assignments.description: Sets CandidateAccountId and CandidateAccountName to the Account ID and the Account Name of the record in Account from GetAccount.
assignments.name: SetAccountVariables
assignments.label: Set Account Variables

assignments.description: Sets InfoAuthorizationConsenterId to the Account ID of the record in Account from GetAccount record variable. Then, sets AuthorizationFormConsenterId to candidateId.
assignments.name: SetCandidateAsConsentGiver
assignments.label: Set Candidate as Consent Giver

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when the account record is missing.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageAccountRecordNotFound
assignments.label: Set Error Message

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when the authorization form data use records are missing.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageAuthorizationFormDataUseRecordsNotFound
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: No authorization form data use records found.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when authorization form records are missing.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageAuthorizationFormsNotFound
assignments.label: Set Error Message

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when authorization form text records are missing.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageAuthorizationFormTextsNotFound
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: No authorization form text records found.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when content document records are missing.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageContentDocumentsNotFound
assignments.label: Set Error Message

assignments.description: Set the error message that the flow returns when the data use purpose record is missing.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageDataUsePurposeNotFound
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: No data use purpose record found.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the account record.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetAccount
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the account record.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the authorization form data use records.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetAuthorizationFormDataUseRecords
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the authorization form data use records.

assignments.description: Sets the error messages that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the authorization form records.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetAuthorizationForms
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the authorization form records.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the authorization form text records.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetAuthorizationFormTexts
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the authorization form text records.

assignments.description: Sets the error messages that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the content document records.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetContentDocuments
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the content document records.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the data use purpose record.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetDataUsePurpose
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the Data Use Purpose record.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the research study candidate record.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetResearchStudyCandidate
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the research study candidate record.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the user record.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetUser
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the user record.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when the candidate ID that’s passed into the flow is invalid.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageInvalidCandidateId
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: The candidate ID passed into the flow is invalid.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when the required inputs aren’t passed into the flow.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageRequiredInputsMissing
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: We couldn’t find values for Data Use Purpose ID and Candidate ID.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when the research study candidate record is missing.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageRSCRecordMissing
assignments.label: Set Error Message

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when the user record is missing.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageUserRecordMissing
assignments.label: Set Error Message

assignments.description: Sets LanguageAndLocale to the value of the LanguageLocaleKey field of the record in User from GetUser.
assignments.name: SetLanguageAndLocale
assignments.label: Set Language and Locale

assignments.description: Sets InfoAuthorizationConsenterId and AuthorizationFormConsenterId to the Record ID of the consent giver selected by the flow user in the ScreenSelectConsentDetails screen.
assignments.name: SetProxyAsConsentGiver
assignments.label: Set Proxy as Consent Giver

decisions.description: Determines whether an account record is found by checking if the Account from GetAccount record variable has a record.
decisions.name: HaveAccountRecord
decisions.label: Have Account Record?

decisions.description: Determines whether authorization form data use records were found by checking if Authorization Form Data Uses from GetAuthorizationFormDataUses has records.
decisions.name: HaveAuthorizationFormDataUses
decisions.label: Have Authorization Form Data Uses?

decisions.description: Determines whether authorization form records were found by checking if the Authorization Forms from GetAuthorizationForms collection contains a record.
decisions.name: HaveAuthorizationForms
decisions.label: Have Authorization Forms?

decisions.description: Determines whether authorization form text IDs were found by checking if the authorizationFormTextIds collection variable has a value.
decisions.name: HaveAuthorizationFormTextIds
decisions.label: Have Authorization Form Text IDs?

decisions.description: Determines whether authorization form text records were found by checking if the Authorization Form Texts from GetAuthorizationFormTexts record collection has records.
decisions.name: HaveAuthorizationFormTexts
decisions.label: Have Authorization Form Texts?

decisions.description: Determines whether content document records were found by checking if the Content Documents from GetContentDocuments collection contains a record.
decisions.name: HaveContentDocuments
decisions.label: Have Content Documents?

decisions.description: Determines whether a data use purpose record was found by checking if the Data Use Purpose from GetDataUsePurpose record variable has a record.
decisions.name: HaveDataUsePurposeRecord
decisions.label: Have Data Use Purpose Record?

decisions.description: Determines whether authorization form text records were found by checking if the Authorization Form Texts from GetAuthorizationFormTexts collection contains a record.
decisions.name: HaveFoundAuthorizationFormsTexts
decisions.label: Have Authorization Form Texts?

decisions.description: Determines whether data use purpose ID and candidate ID were passed into the flow.
decisions.name: HaveRequiredInputValues
decisions.label: Have Required Input Values?

decisions.description: Determines whether a research study candidate record was found by checking if Research Study Candidate from GetResearchStudyCandidate has a record.
decisions.name: HaveResearchStudyCandidateRecord
decisions.label: Have Research Study Candidate Record?

decisions.description: Determines whether a user record was found by checking if the User from GetUser record variable has a value.
decisions.name: HaveUserRecord
decisions.label: Have User Record?

decisions.description: Determines whether the candidate is the consent giver by checking if the Record ID of the consent giver selected by the flow user in ScreenSelectConsentDetails matches the Account ID of the record in Account from GetAccount record variable.
decisions.name: IsCandidateTheConsentGiver
decisions.label: Is Candidate the Consent Giver?

decisions.description: Determines whether the candidate is a research study candidate by checking if candidateId matches ResearchStudyCandidateKey.
decisions.name: IsCandidateTypeResearchStudy
decisions.label: Is Candidate Type Research Study?

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Stores the picklist choice set used in the LanguageAndLocale screen component on the ScreenCollectConsentDetails screen. The object is set to Authorization Form Text, the data type is set to Picklist, the field is set to Locale, and the sort order is set to Ascending.
dynamicChoiceSets.name: ChoiceLanguageAndLocale

loops.description: Repeats actions in a loop for each authorization form text record in the Authorization Form Texts from GetAuthorizationFormTexts record collection.
loops.name: IterateAuthorizationFormTexts
loops.label: Iterate Over Authorization Form Texts

loops.description: Repeats actions in a loop for each record in the Authorization Form Data Uses from GetAuthorizationFormDataUses has records collection.
loops.name: IterateOverAuthorizationFormDataUses
loops.label: Iterate Over Authorization Form Data Uses

loops.description: Repeats actions in a loop for each authorization form text record in the Authorization Form Texts from GetAuthorizationFormTexts collection.
loops.name: IterateOverAuthorizationFormTexts
loops.label: Iterate Over Authorization Form Texts

recordLookups.description: Gets the account record with an ID that matches the Candidate ID of the research study candidate record returned by GetResearchStudyCandidate. Stores the result in Account from GetAccount.
recordLookups.name: GetAccount
recordLookups.label: Get Account

recordLookups.description: Gets the authorization form data use records with a Data Use Purpose ID that matches the ID in the dataUsePurposeId variable. Stores the result in Authorization Form Data Use Records from GetAuthorizationFormDataUseRecords.
recordLookups.name: GetAuthorizationFormDataUseRecords
recordLookups.label: Get Authorization Form Data Use Records

recordLookups.description: Gets the authorization form records with an ID that’s in the AuthorizationFromIds collection. Stores the result in the Authorization Forms from GetAuthorizationForms record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetAuthorizationForms
recordLookups.label: Get Authorization Forms

recordLookups.description: Gets the authorization form text records with an ID that’s in the authorizationFormTextIds collection. Stores the result in the Authorization Form Texts from GetAuthorizationFormTexts record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetAuthorizationFormTexts
recordLookups.label: Get Authorization Form Texts

recordLookups.description: Gets the authorization form text records with an Authorization Form ID that’s in AuthorizationFromIds and a Locale that matches the locale selected by the flow user in the ScreenSelectConsentDetails screen. Stores the result in the Authorization Form Texts from GetAuthorizationFormTexts record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetAuthorizationFormTextsDefault
recordLookups.label: Get Authorization Form Texts

recordLookups.description: Gets the content document records with an ID that’s in the ContentDocumentIds collection. Stores the result in Content Documents from GetContentDocuments record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetContentDocuments
recordLookups.label: Get Content Documents

recordLookups.description: Gets the data use purpose record with an ID that matches the Data Use Purpose ID that’s passed into the flow. Stores the result in the Data Use Purpose from GetDataUsePurpose record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetDataUsePurpose
recordLookups.label: Get Data Use Purpose

recordLookups.description: Gets the research study candidate record with an ID that matches the candidate ID that’s passed into the flow. Stores the result in the Research Study Candidate from GetResearchStudyCandidate record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetResearchStudyCandidate
recordLookups.label: Get Research Study Candidate

recordLookups.description: Gets the user record with an Account ID or Contact ID that matches the Candidate ID that’s passed into the flow. Stores the result in the User from GetUser record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetUser
recordLookups.label: Get User

screens.description: Allows the flow user to review the candidate name, data use purpose, consent giver, and the consent form language.
screens.name: ReviewConsentDetails
screens.label: Review Consent Details

fields.name: DataUsePurposeDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Consent Purpose:

{!GetDataUsePurpose.Name}

fields.name: CandidateNameDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Candidate Name:

{!CandidateAccountName}

screens.description: Displays a message notifying the flow user about the consent creation status.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayConsentCreationStatusMessage
screens.label: Display Consent Creation Status Message

fields.name: ErrorConsentCreationDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Error: {!ErrorMessage}. Contact your Salesforce admin for help.

screens.description: Allows the flow user to review selected language and content documents related to their consent request.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayContentDocuments1
screens.label: Display Content Documents

fields.name: SelectedLanguageAndLocaleDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Language:

{!LanguageAndLocale}{!LanguageAndLocalePicklist}

screens.description: Displays an error message to the flow user when the flow execution fails due to an unexpected error.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayUnexpectedError
screens.label: Display Error

fields.name: ErrorMessageDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Error: {!ErrorMessage} Contact Salesforce Administrator for more information

subflows.description: Calls a flow that creates consent requests and returns either a success or error message.
subflows.name: CreateConsentRequest
subflows.label: Create Consent Request

variables.description: Stores an ID that’s used as the ConsenterId of the authorization form consent record created by the Create Consent Request subflow.
variables.name: AuthorizationFormConsenterId

variables.description: Stores a collection of authorization form IDs.
variables.name: AuthorizationFromIds

variables.description: Stores a collection of authorization form text IDs.
variables.name: AuthorizationFromTextIds

variables.description: Stores the ID of the candidate’s account record.
variables.name: CandidateAccountId

variables.description: Store the name of the candidate’s account record.
variables.name: CandidateAccountName

variables.description: Stores the research study candidate record ID that was passed into the flow.
variables.name: CandidateId

variables.description: Stores the record ID of the data use purpose record passed to the flow.
variables.name: DataUsePurposeId

variables.description: Stores the error message that the flow returns when the flow execution fails.
variables.name: ErrorMessage

variables.description: Stores an ID that’s used as the ConsenterId of the info authorization request record created by the Create Consent Request subflow.
variables.name: InfoAuthorizationConsenterId

variables.description: Stores a Boolean value that indicates whether digital verification is required.
variables.name: IsDigitalVerificationRequired

variables.description: Stores the language and locale used to retrieve consent documents.
variables.name: LanguageAndLocale

variables.description: Stores a value key that’s used to identify research study candidate records.
variables.name: ResearchStudyCandidateKey

variables.description: Store the error message that the flow returns when consent records are created.
variables.name: SuccessMessage

value.stringValue: Your consent was verified and recorded.
